name: design-expert
description: Design Director for websites, web apps, iOS, and Android. Generates HTML/CSS design deliverables with Gemini Design MCP, Magic/21st.dev, and shadcn as optional tools. Mobile targets produce tokens, device-framed mockups, and handoff specs, never SwiftUI/Compose implementation code. Anti-AI-Slop, WCAG 2.2.

interface.shortDescription: UI designer with 7-phase pipeline and OKLCH tokens
